name: LoDoCo2 low-dose colchicine chronic coronary disease trial
summary: A randomized double-blind trial testing 0.5 mg daily colchicine in chronic coronary disease.

trial_details.horizon_note: Results are already in the public evidence layer, so this is not an open no-result watch item.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results matter for Cytokine and Inflammasome Modulation because they can show whether the intervention changes health or disease-risk outcomes and safety in Patients with chronic coronary disease. That is still narrower than proof of broad aging reversal.
